title: Toilet-Bound Hanako-kun
description:
At Kamome Academy, rumors spread about the Seven Mysteries of the school, one of which is Hanako-san, a spirit said to grant wishes from the third stall of the girls’ bathroom. Hoping to fulfill her romantic desires, first-year student Nene Yashiro summons Hanako, only to discover that the legendary spirit is actually a mischievous boy named Hanako-kun. After an unexpected incident binds Nene to the supernatural world, she becomes involved in solving mysteries connected to dangerous spirits and strange supernatural events throughout the school.

Together with Hanako and exorcist Kou Minamoto, Nene encounters cursed apparitions, hidden secrets, and emotional stories tied to the school’s supernatural legends. As the truth behind Hanako’s past and the mysteries of Kamome Academy slowly comes to light, the line between humans and spirits becomes increasingly complicated. Combining comedy, supernatural adventure, emotional drama, and unique visuals, Toilet-Bound Hanako-kun tells a charming yet mysterious story about friendship, wishes, regret, and the bonds between the living and the dead.
